Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportGroup

The list of learning objectives in one cluster, grouped by learning objective parent.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
GroupId

Repository learning objective id of direct parent of learning objective.

 integer

None.
Parents

The list of all parents from the cluster learning objective for the direct parent of learning objectives in this group.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportLearningObjectiveParent

None.
ReportGroupItems

The list of learning objective report items in the current group.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportGroupItem

None.
